name: Elementsaber Makani
name_jp: エレメントセイバー・マカニ
desc: Once per turn: You can send 1 "Elementsaber" monster from your hand to the GY; add 1 "Elementsaber" or "Elemental Lord" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Elementsaber Makani". Once per turn, if this card is in the GY: You can declare 1 Attribute; this card in the GY becomes that Attribute until the end of this turn.
mnst_eff: Once per turn: You can send 1 "Elementsaber" monster from your hand to the GY; add 1 "Elementsaber" or "Elemental Lord" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Elementsaber Makani". Once per turn, if this card is in the GY: You can declare 1 Attribute; this card in the GY becomes that Attribute until the end of this turn.
eff: Once per turn: You can send 1 "Elementsaber" monster from your hand to the GY; add 1 "Elementsaber" or "Elemental Lord" monster from your Deck to your hand, except "Elementsaber Makani". Once per turn, if this card is in the GY: You can declare 1 Attribute; this card in the GY becomes that Attribute until the end of this turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
